title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mindtree - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mindtree - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Mindtree in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindtree:
Mindtree is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree!
